metadata.description: Existing Log Analytics workspace name (created by landing-zone.bicep).

content.json:
# Sovera — security & compliance operations

This workbook surfaces the signals an HDS/HIPAA auditor will ask for: CMK key access, admin sign-ins, RLS violations, storage shared-key usage, APIM auth failures.

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceType == "VAULTS" | where OperationName startswith "Key" | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), OperationName | render timechart
content.title: Key Vault operations (last 24h)

content.query: AzureDiagnostics | where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DBFORPOSTGRESQL" | where Message has_any ("row-level security","sovera: tenant mismatch","sovera: missing tenant claim") | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Resource | render timechart
content.title: Postgres RLS / tenant-assertion errors (last 24h)

content.query: StorageBlobLogs | summarize count() by AuthenticationType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render columnchart
content.title: Blob auth method mix (must be 100% OAuth)

content.query: ApiManagementGatewayLogs | summarize calls = count(), errors = countif(ResponseCode >= 400) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), BackendUrl | extend errorRate = todouble(errors)/calls | render timechart
content.title: APIM error rate by backend (last 24h)

content.query: SigninLogs | where AppDisplayName in ("Azure Portal","Microsoft Azure CLI","Microsoft Azure PowerShell") | summarize count() by ResultType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render columnchart
content.title: Admin sign-ins by outcome

properties.displayName: Sovera — Key Vault CMK key access from unexpected principal
properties.description: Fires when a principal other than the Sovera CMK identity reads a CMK key.
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "VAULTS"
| where OperationName in ("KeyGet", "KeyWrap", "KeyUnwrap", "KeySign", "KeyDecrypt")
| where identity_claim_appid_g !in (dynamic([
    // allow-list filled in post-deploy with Sovera CMK identity appId(s)
]))
| project TimeGenerated, ResourceGroup, Resource, OperationName, CallerIPAddress,
          identity_claim_upn_s, identity_claim_appid_g, ResultType

properties.displayName: Sovera — Storage shared-key usage detected (should be impossible)
properties.description: Fires on any successful shared-key authentication against Sovera storage. allowSharedKeyAccess is false; any hit indicates a config drift or misuse.
properties.query:
StorageBlobLogs
| where AuthenticationType == "AccountKey"
| where StatusCode < 400
| project TimeGenerated, AccountName, OperationName, CallerIpAddress, StatusCode, Uri

properties.displayName: Sovera — Spike in Postgres RLS / tenant assertion errors
properties.description: Fires when more than 25 RLS or sovera tenant-mismatch errors occur in 15 minutes.
properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.DBFORPOSTGRESQL"
| where Category in ("PostgreSQLLogs", "PostgreSQLFlexSessions")
| where Message has_any ("row-level security", "sovera: tenant mismatch", "sovera: missing tenant claim")
| summarize cnt = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Resource
| where cnt > 25

properties.displayName: Sovera — Admin sign-in from new IP
properties.description: Fires when a member of sovera-admins signs in from an IP not seen in the prior 30 days.
properties.query:
let lookback = 30d;
let knownIps = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(lookback) .. ago(1h))
    | where AppDisplayName in ("Azure Portal", "Microsoft Azure CLI", "Microsoft Azure PowerShell")
    | summarize by IPAddress, UserPrincipalName;
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where AppDisplayName in ("Azure Portal", "Microsoft Azure CLI", "Microsoft Azure PowerShell")
| where ResultType == "0"
| where UserPrincipalName has "@"
| join kind=leftanti knownIps on IPAddress, UserPrincipalName
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Location, ClientAppUsed, AppDisplayName

properties.displayName: Sovera — APIM auth failure spike on a single subscription
properties.description: More than 50 401/403 in 5 minutes from one APIM subscription = abuse or compromised client.
properties.query:
ApiManagementGatewayLogs
| where ResponseCode in (401, 403)
| summarize cnt = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), ApimSubscriptionId, BackendUrl
| where cnt > 50
